ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the committee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the committee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the committee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates_committees" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., candidate-committee, committee-member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id", "committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the entity or individual associated with the expenditure */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee reporting the expenditure */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate reporting the expenditure */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_types" (
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure type */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of expenditure (e.g., Contractual, Donation, Contribution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., candidate, committee, election official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making changes */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditures ("expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., expenditure summary, candidate summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_expenditures" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_candidates" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_committees" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_expenditures" (
  "historical_expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical expenditure record */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure being tracked */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the expenditure record was effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_expenditure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee receiving the contribution */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate receiving the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee receiving the donation */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate receiving the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the donation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee incurring the expense */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate incurring the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "expense_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debt */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee incurring the debt */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate incurring the debt */,
  "debt_date" TEXT /* Date of the debt */,
  "debt_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate or committee taking the loan */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee or candidate taking the loan */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan */,
  "loan_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "election_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the election official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_official_id")
)
